query:
-- 将所有包含"车号"的 flight_info 清空（置为 NULL）
UPDATE `groups`
SET flight_info = NULL
WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.arrivalFlight') LIKE '%車號%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.arrivalFlight') LIKE '%车号%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.departureFlight') LIKE '%車號%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.departureFlight') LIKE '%车号%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41NsuGXnm89dPgc.aed783a1450b --database P3EFPXo6PDntRisxqhyY6k --execute 
-- 将所有包含"车号"的 flight_info 清空（置为 NULL）
UPDATE `groups`
SET flight_info = NULL
WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.arrivalFlight') LIKE '%車號%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.arrivalFlight') LIKE '%车号%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.departureFlight') LIKE '%車號%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(flight_info, '$.departureFlight') LIKE '%车号%';
